subcodes.title: Words to Waite, Harrison et al, spoken on 1909-10-12
subcodes.first_line: No it is not a physical condition, but spiritual, a very high one which is so intense it reaches the nerves and these react upon the body. When one is spiritually developed, the body responds to spiritual conditions or emotions.
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @Mosaic imagery, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
